items.name_en: Export Product! Size: Small! Champion🏆 Quality⭐️⭐️⭐️ CHANEL 24S Denim 22bag, Jennie style. 🆕 New member of the 22bag family, rivet denim 22bag. items.name_en: 🍁 Maple Leaf Color! Versatile color style 🌬🌟🌟 In Stock! CHANEL 2024 CF Sequin Bag. I fell in love with the black one at first glance. If you like it, one look is enough. The Maple Leaf🍁 color is very spring-like. Considering durability and a premium feel, I didn't hesitate to get the black one. This CF sequin bag is more eye-catching than the leather version. Practical capacity and moderate size, a style worth collecting! Size: 20cm

items.name_en: In Stock🔥 Chanel 23a Haute Couture Tweed Backpack. I fell in love with this small bag at first glance. Unlike the Duma, it has no flap. The overall design feels warm and comfortable, giving the impression of gradually entering autumn. The cute detail is that the bag is mainly made of tweed texture, with a brown leather pocket at the front. Ready to ship, order now! 🤩🤩

items.name_en: Extra Large Size⭐️⭐️⭐️ WCHANEL 24P hobo Extra Large. This season's hobo is really popular!! They all look good. If you are relatively thin, you can press down the logo area. It feels like pressing down the center zipper would look better and more casual. Tall girls should go for it! The size is really suitable, and the leather is durable, perfect for autumn and winter. Sweet cool vibe~ Petite girls can consider the small size, it's also very nice! Details: Light gold hardware with shiny calfskin, very textured! Underarm carry, there is a Chanel small logo on the chain from the front, very detailed! This SA was really hesitant to buy it or snatch it from someone else. The last one because the caviar leather is very durable. Size: 35x 23 x 11cm Style AS 4246

items.name_en: Medium size 24.5 cm🤩🤩🤩Chanel 24p Black Gold Hobo Medium. I've always liked the casual style of the 22 bag, the only downside is that it has no zipper and no sense of security. Now I finally found a practical and durable caviar leather hobo bag. At first, I thought this bag looked ugly, but later saw someone point out that the large size dips down. I got hooked on the casual vibe. I asked the SA when I went to pick up my New Year's gift, and they said only the medium size 24.5 cm was in stock. The only in-stock black gold one the SA couldn't find, so I tried the caramel first. After coming back, I couldn't get it out of my mind, so I told the SA to keep the black gold for me if they found it. I thought if I didn't get it, it was fate. I didn't expect the SA to be so nice. The logo is small and cute. Dimensions: 19 x 24.5 x 9cm Style A S 4293

items.name_en: In stock 24P Pearl Square Bag is something special, sisters. You might dodge autumn and winter, but you can't dodge spring and summer. This square bag is too beautiful. Who can refuse pearls? + Little Cute Square. Especially suitable for relatively slim girls, because it's not as thick as the square bag, it's thinner on the side. Whether you carry it or hold it, it's very small and exquisite but can still hold some things... Also, the sheepskin has been treated, so it's not as fragile as the sheepskin on the previous Golden Ball Square Bag. Everything is good except the price! I love it so much, sisters. Hope all sisters can buy the bags they like. Don't worry about what others think. 20cm 99337
